_description: WCAG-compliant dark mode palette. Contrast ratios are calculated against the dark surface color they sit on (#0f1117 for page, #1a1f2e for cards). No wcag fields — the validator compares against white, which is wrong for these tokens. Ratios are documented for human reference only.
_usage: Apply via @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) or a data-theme='dark' attribute on <html>. Swap these values for the light-mode values in tokens/colors.json.

text._note: All contrast ratios below are against #0f1117 (page surface). Do not measure these against white.

muted.note: Muted text on #1a1f2e card surface — AA minimum

link.note: Links on dark — AAA. Lighter blue than light mode.

danger.note: Error text on dark — AAA. Lighter red.

success.note: Success text on dark — AAA. Lighter green.

warning.note: Warning text on dark — AAA. Yellow passes on dark backgrounds.

primary-text.note: White on #3b82f6 in dark mode — AA
